name: storytree
description: An agentic software-builder: a DAG of stories grown by AI coding agents, watched live.

scripts.sync: git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main
scripts.db:up: gcloud sql instances patch storytree-pg --project storytree-498613 --activation-policy ALWAYS --quiet
scripts.db:down: gcloud sql instances patch storytree-pg --project storytree-498613 --activation-policy NEVER --quiet
scripts.db:status: gcloud sql instances describe storytree-pg --project storytree-498613 --format="value(state,settings.activationPolicy)"
